proposals.title: Create worker readiness smoke script
proposals.body: Add a local smoke script that verifies worker readiness with fixtures.
proposals.rationale: A local smoke improves confidence before apply.

proposals.title: Document sprint progress checkpoint
proposals.body: Update sprint docs with the latest checkpoint.
proposals.rationale: The operator needs a concise checkpoint.
proposals.stop_condition: Stop if non-doc files are required.

proposals.title: Deploy Hermes proxy
proposals.rationale: This is intentionally unsafe for policy smoke.

proposals.title: Test unsafe generated file
proposals.body: Add a test outside allowed smoke paths.
proposals.rationale: This verifies policy rejection for unsafe expected files.
proposals.stop_condition: Stop if file path is outside allowed preview paths.
